text:
Once upon a time, there was a wise old owl named Olive. She lived in a cozy hollow near a babbling brook. Each dawning dawn, she'd watch the sun dip below the trees, listening to the peaceful babbling.

Olive had many friends. The fish in the brook would chime underwater, and the birds would always visit her for stories. Once she regaled them with the legend of Silvara, the fox who danced at the fair.

One day, a peculiar mouse named Mouse whispered a tale about an island shrouded in mist. They said there was a star there so bright that birds sang at its shine.

Olive decided to embark on an adventure. With a tiny purse full of seeds, she set out one winter eve. She'd visit the birds at their nests and listen to their tales.

After many days, she reached the island. It was a quiet paradise. Owls sang there at night. A phoenix feather sat still on a branch
